# Cognitio Copilot Instructions

- **Stack & Routing**: Next.js 16 App Router + TypeScript strict, Drizzle ORM (Neon Postgres), Groq via `@ai-sdk/groq`/`@ai-sdk/rsc`, Auth.js v5 (Google). UI uses Tailwind + shadcn. Root layout/fonts in [src/app/layout.tsx](src/app/layout.tsx); landing page lives in [src/app/page.tsx](src/app/page.tsx).
- **Data model**: Users → Study Sets → Flashcard Generations → Flashcards. Schema in [src/db/schema.ts](src/db/schema.ts): `study_set` references `user`; `flashcard_generation` tracks `mode` (`prompt_mode` enum), `topic`, `custom_prompt`; `flashcard` links to both `setId` and optional `generationId` (cascade delete on set, `set null` on generation). `masteryLevel` defaults to 0.
- **Auth & ownership**: Auth wiring in [src/auth.ts](src/auth.ts) with Google provider and session/jwt callbacks aligning `token.sub` and `session.user.id`. When mutating/fetching per-user data, resolve `realUserId` via email lookup to handle ID drift ([src/actions/generate.ts](src/actions/generate.ts), [src/app/dashboard/sets/[id]/study/page.tsx](src/app/dashboard/sets/%5Bid%5D/study/page.tsx)). Protected routes are enforced via `authorized` callback in [src/auth.config.ts](src/auth.config.ts); dashboard requires login.
- **Server Actions pattern**: All mutations live in [src/actions](src/actions). Include `'use server'`, authenticate with `auth()`, resolve ownership, then mutate via Drizzle. Use Zod for inputs (`GenerateInputSchema` in [src/actions/generate.ts](src/actions/generate.ts)). Revalidate relevant routes with `revalidatePath` after writes.
- **AI generation flow**: `generateFlashcards` streams structured cards with `createStreamableValue` + `streamObject` against `FlashcardSchema` (array of `{front, back}`). It logs a `flashcard_generation` row, collects complete cards via `isCompleteCard`, persists ordered cards with `generationId`, and closes the stream. Client consumption in [src/components/dashboard/generator.tsx](src/components/dashboard/generator.tsx) awaits `readStreamableValue(object)` to finish before `router.refresh()`; no partial UI rendering yet, but stream must stay <~3s for UX.
- **Set creation UX**: [StudySetList](src/components/dashboard/set-list.tsx) uses `useOptimistic` to prepend a client-generated set while `createStudySet` runs. The action Zod-validates title/description, ensures a DB user exists/gets created, and uses the resolved user ID for the insert; dashboard is revalidated after success.
- **Studying flow**: Set detail page [src/app/dashboard/sets/[id]/page.tsx](src/app/dashboard/sets/%5Bid%5D/page.tsx) checks ownership, fetches latest generation’s cards (ordered) plus legacy/previous generations, and shows “Study Now” when any cards exist. Study mode [src/app/dashboard/sets/[id]/study/page.tsx](src/app/dashboard/sets/%5Bid%5D/study/page.tsx) loads all cards for the set and hands them to the client-side [StudySession](src/components/study/study-session.tsx), which adds keyboard shortcuts (space/arrow/1-4) and calls `updateCardMastery` (ownership-checked, revalidates set + study routes) when rating.
- **UI conventions**: Default to Server Components; mark files with `'use client'` when using hooks (`useState`, `useOptimistic`, `useRouter`). Shared UI atoms live under [src/components/ui](src/components/ui). Styling is Tailwind-first; gradients/animations already in landing and study views—follow that tone.
- **AI client**: Single Groq model exported from [src/lib/ai.ts](src/lib/ai.ts) (`meta-llama/llama-4-scout-17b-16e-instruct`). Keep model usage consistent across actions; prefer `streamObject` over freeform chat for latency and structure.
- **DB access**: Use `db.query.{table}.findFirst/findMany` for reads and `insert().returning()` for mutations; equality filters via `eq` (Drizzle). Connection pool defined in [src/db/index.ts](src/db/index.ts) with SSL enabled for Neon.
- **Dev workflow**: Node 20+. Install with `npm install` (use `--legacy-peer-deps` only if AI SDK conflicts). Commands: `npm run dev`, `npm run build`, `npm run lint`, `npx drizzle-kit push` for schema sync. Env in `.env.local`: `DATABASE_URL`, `AUTH_SECRET`, `AUTH_GOOGLE_ID`, `AUTH_GOOGLE_SECRET`, `GROQ_API_KEY`.
- **Gotchas**: Always resolve `realUserId` before ownership checks; older actions might only gate on `session.user.id`. Generation/stream failures should `stream.error` so clients don’t hang. Deletions use `deleteStudySet` but currently only check login, not ownership—add owner verification before expanding.
- **New features**: For new mutations, mirror the auth+ownership+Zod pattern in `src/actions`. For streaming AI output, reuse `FlashcardSchema` or define a Zod schema and pipe through `streamObject`. When adding tables, update [schema.ts](src/db/schema.ts) and run Drizzle push; cascade deletions thoughtfully so set cleanup removes related flashcards/generations.
